description: Registry of platforms and tools Career-Agents is designed to work with, and integration status per the project roadmap.

supported_platforms.name: Any LLM Chat Interface
supported_platforms.method: Paste full agent .md file (including frontmatter) as system prompt or custom instructions.
supported_platforms.notes: Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or any assistant that accepts a custom system prompt.

supported_platforms.name: Claude Projects
supported_platforms.method: Paste agent file contents into a Project's custom instructions.
supported_platforms.notes: Recommended for persistent, session-to-session use of a single agent.

supported_platforms.name: Custom GPTs
supported_platforms.method: Paste agent file contents into the Custom GPT 'Instructions' field.

supported_platforms.name: Cursor
supported_platforms.integration_notes: Plan: export agent as .cursor rules package; mapping frontmatter fields to Cursor metadata.

supported_platforms.name: Claude Code
supported_platforms.integration_notes: Plan: convert agent frontmatter and workflow into Claude Code subagent manifest. Uses convert.py converters.

supported_platforms.name: Codex
supported_platforms.integration_notes: Plan: emit instruction sets and tool bindings compatible with Codex packaging.

supported_platforms.name: Gemini CLI
supported_platforms.integration_notes: Plan: generate CLI-friendly manifest and installable package; keep agent text as system prompt fallback.

supported_platforms.name: CodeMyFYP-Agents CLI
supported_platforms.notes: Planned installer to remove manual copy-paste friction.
